title: Cars & Coffee Casablanca
excerpt: Breakfast welcome, display parking, express visit and visitors' choice award.
description:
Cars & Coffee Casablanca brings together enthusiasts, visitors and members for a convivial morning. The format includes a coffee welcome, a selection of invited cars, an express tour of the collection and a public vote.

The event is imagined as an accessible gateway into the Museum's automotive culture.

title: Chrome, leather and tension lines
excerpt: A conversation about the materials that shaped the golden age of the automobile.
description:
An evening talk inside the collection focused on classic automotive design: observe the details, retain the markers, interpret an era.

The format imagines an enhanced visit where one vehicle becomes the starting point of a narrative: why this line, why this chrome, why this wheel, why this stance?

title: Educational visit: wheel, engine, memory
excerpt: A school route with observation, the Media Room, workshops and a closing quiz.
description:
This visit helps younger audiences understand mobility through objects: wheel, engine, bodywork, uses and collective memory.

It can be booked as a family route or a school-group format depending on the preferred setup.

title: Restoration workshop & expert gestures
excerpt: An educational presentation around the engine, sheet metal, upholstery and conservation.
description:
The workshop introduces the essential gestures of automotive restoration: diagnose, conserve, transmit and document.

It is intended for curious visitors, young talents and professionals who want to understand the crafts behind rolling heritage.

title: Mechanical dinner: night road
excerpt: A signature table at Le Garage with a guest vehicle and a travel story.
description:
A small-group dinner around a guest vehicle, a road story and a signature table.

The evening extends the collection through hospitality and conversation.

title: Posters, circuits and automotive imaginaries
excerpt: A temporary graphic selection around the road and competition.
description:
The opening presents posters, visual documents and circuit imaginaries in dialogue with the permanent collection.

The route highlights the automobile image as a cultural object.
